infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Closana uses your camera so you can capture wardrobe items directly.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Closana uses your photo library so you can upload closet items, onboarding outfit photos, and profile images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Closana uses your location to personalize weather-aware outfit recommendations.
